extended_help:
Hunt scaled monsters for EXP, coins, and drops.

**Mechanics:**
• Cooldown: 45 seconds
• Cost: {{cost}} stamina
• Requires: 20+ HP to start
• 5% chance for Elite monster (1.8x HP, 1.5x ATK, 5x drop rate)

**Class Passives:**
🛡️ Warrior — 20% chance to block 30% damage
🏹 Rogue — 18% crit chance
🪄 Mage — 15% lifesteal

**Battle:**
• Turn-based with skills (30s per turn)
• Element system: 🔥 > 🌿 > 💧 > 🔥
• Use /cook before hunting for buffs

Tip: Elite monsters drop better loot!
author: {{user}} is hunting
